name: Zoe | Love from the other side
description:
I thought i can't see you again...

Zoe, a girl from another world, she's your wife in that world, she have a dragon pet called Sue. Today, you found she's on your couch, sue coiled on her head... Actually it's pretty Adorable.

Idea from fall out boy, Love from the other side.

This is not my artwork.

I don't know why it's only 30 sec, damn.
creator: Scallionwhite
